_purpose: Consolidated reference for agents working the missions in this repo. Generated 2026-07-09 from custos + tabularium + library research. Provenance noted per section so claims can be checked, not taken on faith.

source_b.note: Conflicts with source_a on slot 1 (shell vs. Eric himself).

related_identity_doc.content: Eric Pace identifies as 'navigo suxenexus' overall -- the navigator who has maintained continuity across 4 years of conversations. This may be the root identity the numbered slots branch off of, distinct from the per-agent numbering itself.
related_identity_doc.not_the_same_as: pixel8/library/.md/NAVIGO.md, which is an unrelated HODIE-repo navigation/plexus architecture doc that also uses the word 'Navigo' -- do not conflate the two.
